title: Klimt's The Kiss
description: This quiz is for the video Gustav Klimt, The Kiss

assessment_items.question_content:
**Klimt's use of gold in *The Kiss* recalls [[☃ dropdown 1]].**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8216469f3b41c7970626beabc527d355.png)
hints: **Klimt's use of gold and patterning recalls Byzantine religious icons.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**In the context of this period of modernization in Vienna, Klimt chose an unique subject that conforms to our everyday experience.** 


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8216469f3b41c7970626beabc527d355.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **In the context of this period of modernization in Vienna, Klimt chose a universal and timeless subject that contrasts to our everyday experience.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Klimt's use of gold and decorative elements highlights the [[☃ dropdown 1]] of the materials over the physical experience of the figures.**  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8216469f3b41c7970626beabc527d355.png)
hints: **Klimt's use of gold and decorative elements highlights the sensuality of the materials over the physical experience of the figures.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The figures' faces stand out from the decorative elements of the composition to show her passivity and his strength and the intensity of desire.**  


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8216469f3b41c7970626beabc527d355.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **The figures' faces stand out from the decorative elements of the composition to show her passivity and his strength and the intensity of desire.**
